contentBody.headMarkup:
<title>Welcome to LWC Communities!</title>

<!-- branding stylesheets -->

<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ basePath }/assets/styles/slds/salesforce-lightning-design-system-part1.css?{ versionKey }"/>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ basePath }/assets/styles/slds/salesforce-lightning-design-system-part2.css?{ versionKey }"/>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ basePath }/assets/styles/slds/salesforce-lightning-design-system-part3.css?{ versionKey }"/>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ basePath }/assets/styles/slds/salesforce-lightning-design-system-part4.css?{ versionKey }"/>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ basePath }/assets/styles/dxp-site-spacing-styling-hooks.min.css?{ versionKey }" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ basePath }/assets/styles/dxp-styling-hooks.min.css?{ versionKey }" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ basePath }/assets/styles/dxp-slds-extensions.min.css?{ versionKey }" />



<!-- branding stylesheets-->

<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ styles/styles.css }" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ styles/print.css }" media="print"/>

<x-oasis-script hidden="true">
 document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    document.dispatchEvent(
        new CustomEvent('experience_interaction', {
            bubbles: true,
            composed: true,
            detail: {
                name: 'set-consent',
                value: true,
            },
        })
    );
 });
</x-oasis-script>

<script>
    let hoverTimer;

    // Use 'true' (Capture phase) to see into the LWC Shadow DOM
    document.addEventListener('mouseover', function(event) {
        // Find the car card that contains the data-id
        const carCard = event.target.closest('.car-grid [data-id]');
        
        if (carCard && window.SalesforceInteractions) {
            const carId = carCard.getAttribute('data-id');
            const carModel = carCard.getAttribute('data-model');

            // 1-second delay ensures the user actually read the specs 
            // and didn't just move their mouse across the screen
            clearTimeout(hoverTimer);
            hoverTimer = setTimeout(() => {
                SalesforceInteractions.sendEvent({
                    interaction: {
                        name: 'Car Specs Viewed',
                        eventType: 'Engagement',
                        item_id: carId,
                        attributes: {
                            // Mapping to your DMO fields
                            engagementChannelAction: 'Hovered to View Specs',
                            websiteCatalogObjectId: carId,
                            searchResultTitle: carModel,
                            engagementType: 'Interest'
                        }
                    }
                });
                console.log('Data Cloud: Captured hover for ' + carId);
            }, 1000);
        }
    }, true);

    // Stop the timer if they move the mouse away before 1 second
    document.addEventListener('mouseout', () => {
        clearTimeout(hoverTimer);
    }, true);
</script>
